overall.description: A third-person perspective game scene showing a character walking through a dark forest at night holding a torch. The character travels along a cobblestone path, passes a deer, and continues through the wilderness in a cinematic, atmospheric setting reminiscent of Skyrim or similar RPGs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path holding a torch, illuminating the dark forest surroundings

entered.detail: wet reflective cobblestone trail winding through the forest
tall dark pine trees silhouetted against the night sky
tall grass and undergrowth lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path through a dark forest at night, holding a torch that casts flickering light on the wet stones. Tall pine trees and grass line the path, creating an enclosed, atmospheric environment.

events.description: deer appears standing on the right side of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a deer standing motionless on the right side of the path

notable_agents.action: deer standing still on the right side of the path, watching the character pass by

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the forest path, a deer appears standing on the right side. The character passes the motionless deer, which watches from the darkness at the edge of the torchlight.

events.description: character turns right toward a body lying on the ground

agents.ego_description: continuing through varied forest terrain and turning to approach a body lying on the path ahead

entered.detail: body lying face down on the cobblestone path, illuminated by the torchlight

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through increasingly open forest terrain with rocky outcrops visible in the distance. Near the end of the clip, the character turns right and approaches a body lying on the ground, illuminated by the torch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a wider, rocky wilderness. It begins with a character walking along a narrow cobblestone path, where a handheld torch casts flickering light across wet stones and towering pine trees. As the character advances, the enclosed environment briefly expands to reveal a motionless deer watching from the darkness at the edge of the light. The scene then shifts toward more open terrain characterized by distant rocky outcrops before the camera turns right to approach a body lying on the ground.
